description: Tandem methodology hooks. board-autosave: at every turn end, commit+push the board sidecar (specs/slices/TEPs) so board state authored by orchestration / create_slice / write_spec is never left only on local disk. The hook self-resolves the board sidecar from THINKUBE_BOARD_ROOT or, failing that, the nearest .mcp.json — so no per-user env/settings wiring is required. (ownership-guard is intentionally NOT armed here: it still does a blocking readFileSync(0) like the one that hung #13, and it is a no-op until the orchestrator sets THINKUBE_ACTIVE_SLICE — arm it only after both are addressed.)
